title: avena transiens
intro: Avena transiens is a rare, perennial oat grass species found in North America. It is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The plant has been traditionally used to soothe digestive issues, promote relaxation, and alleviate insomnia. Avena transiens is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be found in various herbal supplements and sleep-promoting products.
